name: Transparency: Pardarshita
overview: Transparency: Pardarshita, chronicles chase of a common man from offshore to India. It explores India Against Corruption movement or Anna Andolan along with backstage scenarios that led to subsequent birth to the Aam Aadmi Party.

trailers.title: Trailer of 'Transparency: Pardarshita' Documentary Series | English VO
